title: polytaenium citrifolium
intro: Polytaenium citrifolium, also known as Citrifolia, is a plant species in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly referred to as a fern. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, aiding in wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Polytaenium citrifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
